All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

T

takeShot(Board) - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.MachinePlayer
Fires a shot on the given target board, choosing the coordinate via this player's strategy and reporting the outcome back to it.
TAPER_START_RATIO - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.shapes.ShipShapeFactory
 
THINK_DELAY_MS - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.concurrency.MachineTurnThread
Simulated "thinking" pause before the machine fires, in milliseconds.
toggleEnemyFleetPreview() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Toggles the debug-only preview of the machine's full fleet, showing/hiding translucent ship silhouettes on the opponent board without affecting game rules.
toggleTurn() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.GameSession
Switches the active turn between human and machine.
toString() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Coordinate
 
toString() - Method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.Shot
 
TOTAL_FLEET_SIZE - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
totalFleetSize() - Static method in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
 
TRAY_SHIP_SPACING - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardTheme
Spacing (horizontal and vertical) between ship entries in the fleet tray.
trayEntries - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController
Flattened tray entries, in the same order as ShipType.values() with repeats.
TraySelectAdapter(Node, ShipType) - Constructor for class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.PlacementController.TraySelectAdapter
 
TURN_INDICATOR_MARGIN - Static variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardTheme
Margin between the 10x10 grid block and the turn-indicator border around it.
turnIndicator - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.view.board.BoardGridView
 
turnQueue - Variable in class com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.controller.GameController
Buffers the model-level outcome of a shot (human or machine) between the moment it is applied to the Board/GameSession under lock, and the moment its marker is actually painted on screen.
